description: Canonical strategy structure mode registry for strategy-rule display. Workflow types such as Parameter Matrix and WFA are intentionally separate from strategy mode.

engine_families.description: One tradable instrument and one position timeline.
Multiple tradable instruments with portfolio accounting, selection, allocation, and max holding constraints.

capability_layers.label: Factor pipeline
capability_layers.description: Shared vector layer for factor construction, preprocessing, composite scoring, point-in-time audit, cache, and StatAnalyser outputs. It feeds existing single-asset or multi-asset modes rather than becoming a separate engine family.

modes.label: Single-asset signal strategy
modes.description: One tradable instrument at a time. Parameter tests and WFA may be run on top, but they are workflows rather than modes.

modes.label: Multi-factor entry/exit roles
modes.description: Multiple predictive factors with explicit roles, such as one factor for entry and another factor for exit.

modes.label: Calendar/session event trading
modes.description: Rules triggered by dates, weekdays, market sessions, opens, closes, holidays, or custom trading calendars. Daily single-asset same-session execution is active; portfolio use reuses the same calendar predicate layer.

modes.label: Multi-asset portfolio
modes.description: Multiple assets can be held together up to portfolio limits. MVP supports indicator matrices, calendar rebalance, eligibility, ranking, top-N selection, equal-weight allocation, position limits, costs, equity, holdings, and rebalance audit.

modes.label: Multi-asset trigger selection
modes.description: Many assets are scanned; triggered assets are traded by first-trigger order or deterministic tie-break fields such as market cap, price, float, liquidity, volume, or score; max simultaneous holdings are enforced.

modes.label: Dynamic allocation
modes.description: Rule-driven portfolio weight changes across assets.

analysis_overlays.label: Pattern win-rate scanner
analysis_overlays.description: Pure diagnostic overlay for counting pattern hit-rate without trade, holding, capital, or portfolio equity simulation. Trading triggered assets belongs to multi_asset_trigger_selection.
